import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ s: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in s
    if not inserted
      if x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut flush = false
  if i == n
    flush = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        flush = true
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      flush = true
    end
  end
  if flush
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
